name: SDeltaPhi-35 Minimal Closure Criteria for AGI AI-Readable Package
description: SDeltaPhi-35 reformulates Artificial General Intelligence as a closure judgment problem rather than a human-equivalence label, benchmark aggregation, or impressionistic capability claim. It decomposes AGI evaluation into five minimal operational closure criteria: global generality, long-horizon recursive agency, world-model correspondence, self-updating robustness, and creative path generation.
